$comment: Editorial input for scripts/pylon/migrate-articles.ts. sourcePath is relative to astro-docs/. collectionId is the target Pylon collection (currently the 'Nx Knowledge Base' collection). Set weight to override PYLON_DEFAULT_SEARCH_WEIGHT for a single article. extraRedirects covers section index pages when a whole section moves. Entries are the scored migrate-set (support-style, niche, error-driven content); already-migrated articles whose source .mdoc was deleted are removed from this list but stay in src/content/pylon-kb.json, which drives redirects. Kept in docs (broad/evergreen/onboarding): all package-manager workspace guides, keep-nx-versions-in-sync, define-environment-variables, feature-based-testing, advanced-update, browser-support, include-assets-in-build, standalone-to-monorepo, resolve-circular-dependencies, performance-profiling. Borderline resolved 2026-07-08: troubleshoot-nx-install-issues and identify-dependencies-between-folders migrate (graph replaced by static screenshot); nx-sandbox-unix-sockets parked in docs.
